features.description: Add approved Argon2id, hidden prompt, and SHA-2 dependencies to Cargo.toml and refresh Cargo.lock
features.validation: cargo test -- --list | rg -q '^kdf::tests::argon2id_derives_expected_32_byte_key: test$' && cargo test kdf::tests::argon2id_derives_expected_32_byte_key -- --exact

features.description: Add sha256-prefixed key id helpers and .git/git-zcrypt/index.json read/write/update support in src/key_store.rs
features.validation: cargo test -- --list | rg -q '^key_store::tests::key_id_for_key_uses_sha256_prefix: test$' && cargo test key_store::tests::key_id_for_key_uses_sha256_prefix -- --exact && cargo test -- --list | rg -q '^key_store::tests::index_json_round_trips_sorted_key_ids: test$' && cargo test key_store::tests::index_json_round_trips_sorted_key_ids -- --exact && cargo test -- --list | rg -q '^key_store::tests::index_json_rejects_invalid_shapes: test$' && cargo test key_store::tests::index_json_rejects_invalid_shapes -- --exact

features.description: Update generate-key and import-key to register raw keys in index.json and reject duplicate key material
features.validation: cargo test -- --list | rg -q '^key_store::tests::generate_import_and_export_require_raw_32_byte_keys: test$' && cargo test key_store::tests::generate_import_and_export_require_raw_32_byte_keys -- --exact && cargo test -- --list | rg -q '^key_store::tests::register_key_rejects_duplicate_key_material: test$' && cargo test key_store::tests::register_key_rejects_duplicate_key_material -- --exact

features.description: Add derive-key setup command with hidden confirmation prompt and --stdin password input
features.validation: cargo test -- --list | rg -q '^kdf::tests::derive_key_from_password_stdin_trims_single_trailing_newline: test$' && cargo test kdf::tests::derive_key_from_password_stdin_trims_single_trailing_newline -- --exact && cargo test -- --list | rg -q '^kdf::tests::hidden_prompt_confirmation_mismatch_fails: test$' && cargo test kdf::tests::hidden_prompt_confirmation_mismatch_fails -- --exact

features.description: Update clean to write hash-prefixed blob key ids and smudge to resolve blob key ids through index.json
features.validation: cargo test --test filter_roundtrip -- --list | rg -q '^raw_key_round_trip_uses_hash_prefixed_key_id: test$' && cargo test --test filter_roundtrip raw_key_round_trip_uses_hash_prefixed_key_id -- --exact && cargo test --test filter_roundtrip -- --list | rg -q '^password_derived_key_round_trips_from_stdin_setup: test$' && cargo test --test filter_roundtrip password_derived_key_round_trips_from_stdin_setup -- --exact

features.description: Update status output to list aliases with hash-prefixed key ids and warn on key/index mismatches
features.validation: cargo test -- --list | rg -q '^git_config::tests::status_lists_aliases_with_hash_prefixed_key_ids: test$' && cargo test git_config::tests::status_lists_aliases_with_hash_prefixed_key_ids -- --exact && cargo test -- --list | rg -q '^git_config::tests::status_warns_on_key_index_mismatch: test$' && cargo test git_config::tests::status_warns_on_key_index_mismatch -- --exact

features.description: Update README.md and progress.toml for approved password-derived key behavior
features.validation: cargo test --test filter_roundtrip -- --list | rg -q '^password_derived_key_round_trips_from_stdin_setup: test$' && cargo test --test filter_roundtrip password_derived_key_round_trips_from_stdin_setup -- --exact && rg -q 'derive-key|sha256:' README.md && test "$(toml get progress.toml 'items' | jq '.[]|select(.id=="password-kdf-design").passes')" = "true"
